title: felix_v1: int6+zstd, fp16 embed, MLP 3x, seq4096, sliding window eval
author: felix-ab

data.description: Increases MLP width multiplier from 2x to 3x to use freed artifact budget for a larger model body.
Keeps tied embedding / lm_head weights in fp16 passthrough rather than quantizing them.
Adds forward_logits() for logit access without loss reduction to support sliding-window evaluation.

novel_contributions: int6 quantization for body weights to reduce artifact size
zstd level-22 compression instead of zlib
fp16 embedding passthrough for quality-sensitive embeddings
MLP width increased to 3x within the artifact budget
sliding window evaluation with stride 512 for improved bpb measurement
